Short CV

Born in Bursa, 1996. She graduated from Bursa İpekçilik Anadolu İmam Hatip High School in 2014. In 2018, she completed the Department of Child Development, Üsküdar University. In 2019, she completed the Department of Psychology, Üsküdar University. In the Erasmus Program; during the 2018-2019 Fall period, she continued her education at Lusófona University. She is currently a graduate student in the Department of Neuroscience, Üsküdar University, Institute of Health Sciences and also an undergraduate student in the Department of Philosophy, İstanbul University, Faculty of Open and Distance Learning.

Since September 2019, she has been an academic member in Üsküdar University Faculty of Health Sciences, Department of Child Development. Academic interests include neuroplasticity, neurophilosophy and quantum consciousness.
